final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing employee ID badge design for 字节跳动, showing both front and back sides with photorealistic rendering.

Style/medium: needs a "真实感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of corporate ID card product photography, Behance UI/branding mockup realism tradition, 2020s tech company badge design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must show both front side and back side of the badge, laid out side by side or as a two-panel spread
Subject: must include a 字节跳动 employee ID badge (both front and back faces)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, studio-lit product photography atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include realistic card material with lanyard hole, printed surface texture, and subtle plastic sheen
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve both front and back panels as clearly distinct and fully visible
Avoid: cartoon, flat illustration, low-detail rendering
